result.summary: The page is largely intact but has a few notable visual defects: an empty header button with no label, a 'SCROLL DOWN' bar overlapping and obscuring the legal fine print text, and readability concerns with the terms and conditions.

issues.description: The yellow button in the top-right of the header is completely empty — it has no visible text or icon (likely intended to be a 'Sign Up' or 'Log In' CTA that failed to render).
issues.suggestion: Ensure the button label/text asset loads correctly, and provide fallback text so the primary CTA is always visible.

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' indicator overlaps the legal terms and conditions fine print, obscuring several lines of required disclosure text about the bonus offers.
issues.suggestion: Reposition the scroll indicator below the fine print or add spacing/margin so the legal text is fully readable, which is important for regulatory compliance.

issues.description: The fine print terms text (dark blue on yellow) is extremely small and dense, making it very hard to read, especially where it wraps around the overlapping element.
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size and line spacing of the disclaimer text, or provide a clearly linked 'Full T&Cs' page with legible formatting.

issues.description: The '1x PLAYTHRU' badge overlaps the 'BONUS CODE WELCOME' text edge and the hero image awkwardly, appearing slightly misaligned with surrounding elements.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the badge position and z-index so it doesn't collide with adjacent text, or reserve dedicated space for it in the layout.
